flags.description: Master toggle for the whole module. OFF disables the /me/delegations surface AND the /platform/impersonation surface AND the DelegationResolver (permission checks + approver-selector fall back to the raw RBAC-only path). Emergency-only kill switch.
Toggles the role-delegation surface only. OFF disables /me/delegations + hides the OOF-aware substitution in workflow/approvals. Impersonation surface stays alive.

Toggles the impersonation surface only. OFF refuses new sessions AND terminates all active sessions with end_trigger=admin_revocation on the next EndImpersonationSessionsJob run. Nuclear option — used only during confirmed security incidents affecting the platform-admin plane.
Disable delegation_type=emergency. Regular delegations still work. Used when the emergency-flow is being investigated for abuse.
DelegationResolver's LRU cache. OFF forces every check to hit the DB — for debugging cache-drift issues without disabling the resolver itself.
WarmDelegationResolverCache listener on ApplicationBooted. OFF means the resolver starts cold. Useful for CI + tests.
impersonation.enforce_read_only middleware. OFF is DANGEROUS — is_read_only=true sessions become read-write. Emergency-only, requires DPO sign-off.
